title: If and Else
description: Conditional execution with if, else if, else.

slides.title: If Statements 🤔

quizData.explanation: `x = 5` is an assignment, not a comparison. Use `==` for equality. Dart catches this as a compile error because conditions must be boolean.

slides.title: See it in Action
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use curly braces even for single statements

Even if the body is one line, always use `{}` to avoid bugs when adding more lines later.
